generated_oml:
instance BCSDataSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within Building Control System (BCS) providing operational data for digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSDataTransmitted
]

instance BCSDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSDataSensor
]

instance BCSData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data sourced from Building Control System components"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler, RealTimeDataExchangeEnabler
]

instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-enriched semantic model representing infrastructure assets with sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) enabler for automated transformation of BIM models into deployable DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, OptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeDataExchangeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data exchange between physical infrastructure and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for seamless integration of custom services and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for infrastructure asset performance tracking"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for forecasting asset failures and maintenance needs"
    DTDFVocab:provides FailurePredictionInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for scenario testing and performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioSimulationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for resource allocation and energy efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides ResourceOptimizationInsight
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Decision-making support service for infrastructure management strategies"
    DTDFVocab:provides StrategicDecisionInsight
]

instance PerformanceMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights on infrastructure performance metrics"
]

instance FailurePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights on potential asset failures"
]

instance ScenarioSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from simulation of various operational scenarios"
]

instance ResourceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized resource allocation and energy usage insights"
]

instance StrategicDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Strategic decision-making support for lifecycle management"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BuildingComponent, BCSDataSensor
]

instance BuildingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Infrastructure asset in AECO domain with complex and heterogeneous components requiring lifecycle management from design to operation"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The lifecycle stages include initial device modeling within BIM environments to define sensors, actuators, and controllers; Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) extraction of structured representations and automatic generation of deployable DT artifacts; real-time data exchange for continuous synchronization between physical and digital twins; interactive visualization interfaces for monitoring and control; and modular integration of custom services to support operational evolution and adaptation to changing requirements."
]
